prompt: A realistic tailor shop scene. A meticulous tailor is obsessively adjusting a suit on one mannequin, using many pins, tight stitches, and precise measurements. That mannequin looks perfectly fitted. Around it, several other mannequins wear identical suits but appear uncomfortable — too tight, wrinkled, or poorly fitted. Warm natural lighting, cinematic realism, high detail, shallow depth of field, no text, no labels, no diagrams.
metaphor: An overly tailored suit fits one mannequin perfectly but fails others, showing a model memorizing specific details instead of generalizing.
